summary: Valuation Document Upload & AI Extraction Feature - 16/16 backend tests passed after fixing GridFS bug. Frontend UI verified with all upload card elements present.

fixed.issue: GridFS bucket initialization used db.delegate instead of db, causing TypeError
fixed.fix: Changed AsyncIOMotorGridFSBucket(db.delegate) to AsyncIOMotorGridFSBucket(db) on lines 6394 and 6431

passed_tests: 2. test_02_update_company_profile - PUT updates company profile successfully
3. test_03_upload_excel_document - POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/upload uploads Excel to GridFS
4. test_04_verify_document_in_project - GET confirms document appears in project.documents array
6. test_06_extract_without_documents_fails - Returns 400 when no documents uploaded
12. test_12_full_e2e_flow - Complete flow: create -> profile -> upload -> extract -> save

upload_endpoint.description: POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/upload stores file in GridFS and adds to project.documents

extract_endpoint.description: POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/extract reads Excel via openpyxl, sends to GPT-5.2, returns structured JSON

upload_card_ui.description: Step 2 shows Upload Financial Statements card with file input and Choose Files button

extract_button_visibility.description: Extract with AI button only shows when files are uploaded

file_type_validation.description: Only PDF, Excel, Word, CSV allowed; ZIP rejected

openpyxl_integration.description: Backend correctly reads .xlsx files from GridFS using openpyxl

gpt52_integration.description: GPT-5.2 extracts financial data from spreadsheet content

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py lines 6394 and 6431 used db.delegate instead of db for GridFS bucket initialization
Upload endpoint correctly validates file types and size (10MB limit)
Extract endpoint reads Excel sheets via openpyxl and sends content to GPT-5.2
Frontend ValuationWizard.jsx correctly shows upload card in Step 2 with conditional Extract button
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed GridFS bucket initialization on lines 6394-6395 and 6431)
test_credentials: Test users created dynamically via mongosh and cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test Excel file at /tmp/test_financials.xlsx with P&L data (Revenue 500/400/300, EBITDA 100/80/60, PAT 60/45/35)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document upload and AI extraction feature for valuation module fully tested. Backend endpoints POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/upload and POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/extract working. GridFS bug was fixed (db.delegate -> db). Frontend shows upload card in Step 2 with Choose Files button and conditional Extract with AI button. GPT-5.2 extracts financial data from Excel files via openpyxl. Previous valuation tests (18/18) still pass for core functionality.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Upload endpoint returning 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: AsyncIOMotorGridFSBucket was initialized with db.delegate instead of db. The db variable is already an AsyncIOMotorDatabase, so using db.delegate returns the underlying pymongo Database which is incompatible with Motor's async GridFS bucket.
reproduction_steps: 2. Try to upload a file via POST /api/valuation/projects/{id}/upload
3. Backend throws TypeError: First argument to AsyncIOMotorGridFSBucket must be MotorDatabase
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed AsyncIOMotorGridFSBucket(db.delegate) to AsyncIOMotorGridFSBucket(db) on lines 6394 and 6431 of server.py
